title: Rain Brings Relief in Hyderabad - The Hans India
full_text:
Rain Brings Relief in Hyderabad
Moderate rainfall was recorded in several parts of Hyderabad on Wednesday afternoon, bringing much-needed respite from the intense heat.
Hailstorms were reported in areas including Vanasthalipuram, Bhagyalatha, Hayathnagar, Saheb Nagar, Gayathrinagar, and Bank Colony, among others.
The sudden change in weather led to a noticeable drop in temperatures, offering relief to residents who had been grappling with scorching conditions in recent days.
